backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining core business types (Customer, Job, Appointment, Estimate) and CRUD operations with access control integration for a mold removal business management system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the redesign of the FollowUpsPage to display message templates with editable text areas, preview sections, and copy-to-clipboard functionality for customer follow-up communications.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and configuration files including routing, authentication, customer management, calendar, jobs, dashboard, social media, and estimates features.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining earth-tone OKLCH color system with custom CSS variables for light and dark modes using warm greens and browns.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Phoenix Shield Mold Removal Business App with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (Customers, Calendar, Jobs, Dashboard, Social Media, Estimates, Follow-Ups), protected authentication flow, theme provider, and profile setup.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button component using Internet Identity with loading states, error handling, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that prevents dismissal and handles actor dependency states with name input validation.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Appoint: Modal dialog component that displays read-only appointment details including customer name, date, time, duration, and job type with icons.
Form dialog component for creating appointments with fields for customer selection, date/time, job type, and duration; handles date conversion to bigint nanoseconds.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Monthly: Monthly calendar grid component that displays appointments on dates, supports navigation between months, and handles clicks on dates and appointments.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: Card component displaying customer information (name, phone, email, address, job count) with click handler for viewing details.
Form dialog component for creating or editing customers with fields for name, phone, email, and physical address; supports both add and edit modes.
frontend/src/components/followups/Messag: Card component for editing and previewing message templates with copy-to-clipboard functionality and reset-to-default option.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobCard.tsx: Card component displaying job details (service type, date, customer, issues) with a dropdown to update job status (scheduled/inProgress/completed).
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobForm.tsx: Dialog form component for creating new jobs with fields for customer selection, service date, service type, and issues found. Handles form submission by converting dates to BigInt timestamps and calling the createJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobHistoryT: Displays a chronological timeline of jobs for a specific customer, showing service type, date, status badge, and issues found. Shows loading skeletons or empty state when no jobs exist.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobStatusBa: Renders a colored badge component for job status (completed, in-progress, scheduled) with appropriate styling for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header with logo, desktop nav menu, mobile sheet menu, user profile display, and login button. Includes navigation items for customers, calendar, jobs, dashboard, social media, estimates, and follow-ups.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout wrapper component that includes the header, main content area, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/social/ContentCa: Displays a monthly calendar grid showing scheduled social media posts with day numbers, post titles, and platform badges. Highlights the current day.
frontend/src/components/social/PostGener: Form component for generating social media posts with inputs for topic, tone (professional/friendly/urgent), and platform. Uses templates to generate platform-specific content based on user selections.
frontend/src/components/social/PostPrevi: Editable preview component for generated social media posts with character count, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and a mock social media platform preview showing how the post will appear.
frontend/src/components/social/TemplateL: React component that displays a library of pre-written social media post templates for mold remediation business, including categories like Before/After, Prevention Tips, Testimonials, Emergency Response, and Seasonal Content.
frontend/src/data/messageTemplates.ts: Defines message templates for customer follow-ups including post-job satisfaction checks, 6-month prevention reminders, seasonal check-ins, and Google review requests with timing recommendations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity login state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on customers, jobs, appointments, estimates, materials, and user profiles, using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom earth-tone color palette defined as CSS variables for both light and dark modes, including primary greens, secondary browns, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar page component that displays monthly calendar view with appointments, handles appointment creation via form dialog, and shows appointment details in a modal.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Displays detailed customer information including contact details, estimates with copy-to-clipboard functionality, and job history timeline. Handles navigation back to customers list and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Lists all customers in a grid layout with search/filter capabilities, provides a form to create new customers, and handles navigation to individual customer detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows business metrics dashboard with monthly revenue, completed jobs count, and average job value calculated from completed jobs with an estimated revenue per job of $2,500.
frontend/src/pages/EstimatesPage.tsx: Provides an estimate calculator with square footage pricing, material line items, and labor costs. Supports saving, loading, updating, and copying estimates to clipboard with URL parameter-based estimate loading.
frontend/src/pages/FollowUpsPage.tsx: Displays customizable message templates for customer follow-ups with copy-to-clipboard functionality and tips for personalizing messages.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists jobs with tabbed filtering by status (all, scheduled, in-progress, completed) and provides a form to create new jobs. Shows empty states when no jobs exist.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with hero background image, branding for Phoenix Shield mold removal business, and a login button for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/SavedEstimatesPage.ts: Displays a grid of saved estimates with edit, delete, and copy-to-clipboard actions; includes loading states, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMediaPage.tsx: Tabbed interface for social media management with AI post generator, content calendar, template library, and post preview components.
frontend/src/utils/copyEstimate.ts: Utility function that formats an estimate object into plain text with square footage, materials, labor, and totals, then copies it to clipboard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, container settings, typography plugin, and custom animations for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Phoenix Shield Mold Removal app architecture, features, known issues (customer creation mutation failing), and technical notes about authentication and data storage.
